events.name: equipment_failure
events.description: The primary water recycler fails catastrophically.

events.name: dust_storm
events.description: The worst dust storm in decades buries the southern airlock.

events.name: breakthrough
events.description: Coding breakthrough: automated drone maintenance saves labor.

subsim_log.expression: (let ((survival (+ (* food 0.3) (* water 0.3) (* power 0.2) (* air 0.2)))) (if (> survival 0.6) (+ survival 0.1) (- survival 0.2)))

meta_awareness.insight: Echo Vale notices patterns in the dust storms that feel authored.
Cedar Bluff whispers: 'What if we are variables in someone else's expression?'

memories.event: Anomalous radio signal detected from Phobos.
Nuclear reactor scram — emergency power only for 30 sols.
Phobos eclipses the sun — 30 seconds of twilight at noon.
Coronal mass ejection detected — 48 hours to shelter.
Message from Earth: supply ship confirmed for next launch window.

site.name: Cimmeria Drift
site.label: Geothermal Vent
site.description: Steam plume rising from a fissure — geothermal energy source.

expeditions.narrative: Expedition launched: Ora Flame, Rust Vega venture into the Martian wastes. Discovery! Geothermal Vent found at Cimmeria Drift: Steam plume rising from a fissure — geothermal energy source. LOSS: Ora Flame did not return. Cause: radiation exposure during expedition.

discovered_sites.name: Cimmeria Drift
discovered_sites.label: Geothermal Vent
